title: doctor-install output data
description: Shape of the ``data`` field on a ``doctor-install`` envelope.

status.description: installed — a new scheduled task was created; already_installed — a task with the same name was already present (no duplicate); uninstalled — an existing task was removed; not_installed — uninstall requested but nothing was scheduled.
status.title: Status

platform.description: Which scheduler backend handled the request (Task Scheduler vs crontab).
platform.title: Platform

command.description: The exact non-interactive command the scheduler runs each interval.
command.title: Command

interval_minutes.description: The scan cadence the task was (or would be) set to.
interval_minutes.title: Interval Minutes

spec_path.description: Durable doctor spec the scheduled command reads (under the journal home).
spec_path.title: Spec Path

notify.description: Whether the durable spec carries notify=true (scheduled scan alerts on stalls).
notify.title: Notify
